tagline: A community record of road degradation on Fox Road.

petition.headline: Resurface Fox Road and end the cycle of patchwork repairs.
asks: Commission a full engineering inspection of Fox Road within 30 days.
Carry out interim hazard patching of all potholes deeper than 50 mm immediately.
Schedule and budget a full-depth resurfacing within the next financial year.
Publish a maintenance and inspection schedule so residents can hold council accountable.

social.shareText: Fox Road in Rosebank is falling apart. See the evidence and sign the petition.
